headings.strategy: Expressive, tracking-tight, uppercase for major titles. Use text-shadow for readability over canvas.

body.strategy: Clean, highly legible for game instructions and HUD.

layout_spacing.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Bento grid for instructions, massive center stage for game canvas.

surface_styles.cards: Glassmorphism (Crystal) for Car Selection. bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-xl rounded-3xl
surface_styles.game_hud: Neumorphism mix. Dark/Glass floating pills for Speed, Lap, Timer. bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md text-white border border-white/20 rounded-full px-6 py-2 shadow-lg
surface_styles.buttons: Vibrant, chunky. bg-[#4DA8DA] text-white font-black uppercase tracking-wider rounded-xl hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all

animations.hover: Scale up slightly (scale-105), drop shadow increase.
animations.page_load: Staggered fade-in up for text. Car selection cards slide in.
animations.game_events: Pulse animation on Win/Lose text. Counter ticking animation.

hero_background.description: Vibrant daytime Tokyo landscape with race track

scenery_references.description: Pathway between cherry blossom trees (use for visual reference or decorative image)

landing_page.structure: Hero section with background image and glassy header. Game container below hero. Features/Instructions grid (Bento style).
landing_page.instructions_to_main_agent: Use the hero_background as a full-width section or massive rounded container. Include title and WASD/Arrow instructions.

car_selection.structure: 3 Glassmorphic cards overlaid on the game canvas before start.
car_selection.instructions_to_main_agent: Render the car selection UI using React state over the canvas. Cards should pop on hover. Highlight selected car.

game_canvas.instructions_to_main_agent: Draw grey asphalt track with green grass and scattered pink cherry blossom trees. Use the provided car sprites. Ensure 60fps.

hud_overlay.structure: Floating pill-shaped elements at the top of the canvas.
hud_overlay.instructions_to_main_agent: Speedometer, Lap Counter, Timer. High contrast (white text on dark glassy pill). Must be absolute positioned over canvas.

end_screen.instructions_to_main_agent: Big bold 'YOU WIN' (green) or 'YOU LOSE' (red) text in Unbounded font. Restart button. Glassy backdrop.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute. Example: data-testid='start-game-btn', data-testid='car-select-red'.
